message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam noteBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam notePadding 5
skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam arrowThickness 1
skinparam activationBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam activationBorderColor #000000
skinparam activationFontColor #000000
skinparam activationPadding 5
skinparam combinedFragmentBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
skinparam combinedFragmentBorderColor #000000
skinparam combinedFragmentFontColor #000000
skinparam combinedFragmentPadding 5

participant "Agent" as Agent
participant "VirtualCoffeeMachine" as VirtualCoffeeMachine
participant "TestThing" as TestThing

Agent ->> Agent: top:wait()

box "strict" #F0F0F0
  box "par" #F0F0F0
    Agent ->> VirtualCoffeeMachine: subscribeEvent: "maintenance"
    VirtualCoffeeMachine -->> Agent: confirmation
    VirtualCoffeeMachine ->> Agent: data-pushed
  end
  box "par" #F0F0F0
    Agent ->> TestThing: writeProperty: "string"
  end
end

note over Agent,VirtualCoffeeMachine: wait 500ms

box "strict" #F0F0F0
  box "par" #F0F0F0
    Agent ->> VirtualCoffeeMachine: readProperty: "state"
    VirtualCoffeeMachine -->> Agent: response
  end
  box "par" #F0F0F0
    Agent ->> TestThing: writeProperty: "string"
  end
end

@enduml
